note: All 25 case(s) below were published directly to TestRail outside this repo's /fetch-section -> /migrate-section pipeline and were never tracked locally until this backfill (2026-07-23). Case IDs and creation dates indicate they predate this migration project. Content is taken verbatim (HTML converted to plain text only) -- no v2 style-rewrite, Plan Gates extraction check, or Suite 6 source_case_ids cross-reference has been done yet; grill_status is honestly marked not-tracked-by-repo rather than assumed confirmed. live TestRail section is named "Banner Status Card" (missing "Cookie") vs the doc's "Cookie Banner Status Card".

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Banner Status card renders with all required fields and controls
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. Banner installation is complete (banner Active).

steps.content: Locate the Cookie Banner Status card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: A card showing the configured website URL should be displayed at the top, with a "Cookie banner status" label visible inside the left sub-section.

steps.content: Observe the banner status indicator on the card.
steps.expected: The banner status (Active/Inactive) should be displayed below the "Cookie banner status" label.

steps.content: Observe the Regulation field on the right side of the card.
steps.expected: The Regulation field should display the active regulation (e.g. GDPR).

steps.content: Observe the Targeted location field on the right side of the card.
steps.expected: The Targeted location field should display the current geo-target setting (e.g. Worldwide) with a "Geo-target" link displayed inline alongside the location value.

steps.content: Verify the "Customise banner" link is present at the bottom of the card.
steps.expected: The "Customise banner" link should be visible and interactive at the bottom of the card.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Banner Status card shows Inactive with a Get installation code prompt when the installation code is not added
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. The CookieYes installation code has not been added to the site (banner Inactive).

steps.content: Locate the Cookie Banner Status card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: A card showing the configured website URL should be displayed at the top of the card.

steps.content: Observe the banner status value.
steps.expected: The status should read "Inactive" in red.

steps.content: Observe the message below the status.
steps.expected: "Looks like the installation code isn't added to your site yet!" should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the installation link at the bottom of the left sub-section.
steps.expected: A "Get installation code" link should be displayed at the bottom of the left sub-section.

steps.content: Verify the verify installation control next to the status.
steps.expected: A verify installation control should be displayed to the right of the "Inactive" status text.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Banner Status card shows Active when the installation code is verified
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. The CookieYes installation code is installed and verified (banner Active).

steps.content: Locate the Cookie Banner Status card on the Dashboard.
steps.expected: A card showing the configured website URL should be displayed at the top of the card.

steps.content: Observe the banner status value.
steps.expected: The status should read "Active".

steps.content: Observe the message below the status.
steps.expected: "You have successfully set up your cookie banner!" should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the Get installation code control next to the status.
steps.expected: A "Get installation code" control should be displayed alongside the Active status.

steps.content: Verify the link at the bottom of the section.
steps.expected: A "Live preview banner" link should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Get installation code modal opens with manual and GTM tabs when the code is not installed
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. The CookieYes installation code has not been added to the site (banner Inactive).

steps.content: Click the "Get installation code" link on the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The banner installation modal should open.

steps.content: Observe the alert banner at the top of the modal.
steps.expected: An alert should indicate the CookieYes installation code isn't added to the site.

steps.content: Observe the tabs in the modal.
steps.expected: "Install manually on website" and "Install with Google Tag Manager" tabs should be displayed, with "Install manually on website" selected by default.

steps.content: On the manual tab, verify the installation code snippet and its action buttons.
steps.expected: The installation code snippet should be displayed with "Copy code" and "Send code to a teammate" buttons, and a "Verify" button.

steps.content: Click the "Install with Google Tag Manager" tab.
steps.expected: The GTM section should be displayed with the site/website key, "Copy code"/"Send code to a teammate" buttons, and a "Verify" button.

steps.content: Click the close (X) control on the modal.
steps.expected: The installation modal should close.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Verify button in the installation modal confirms a successful installation after the code is added
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard with the banner installation modal open on the "Install manually on website" tab. The installation code has been pasted into the site's source code.

steps.content: On the manual tab, click "Copy code".
steps.expected: The banner installation code should be copied to the clipboard.

steps.content: After the code is present on the live site, return to the installation modal and click the "Verify" button.
steps.expected: A "Connecting to your site to verify installation" loader should be displayed and the site should open in a mini window.

steps.content: Wait for verification to complete.
steps.expected: A success message should be displayed: "You have successfully implemented a cookie banner on your site!"

steps.content: Observe the modal heading after verification.
steps.expected: The modal heading should update to "CookieYes is installed on your site!"

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Banner Status card shows Inactive with an Enable banner link when banner display is disabled and the code is not installed

steps.expected: A card showing the configured website URL should be displayed at the top of the card.

steps.content: Observe the banner status value.
steps.expected: The status should read "Inactive".

steps.content: Observe the message below the status.
steps.expected: "Looks like you have disabled the banner on your site." should be displayed (disabled state takes precedence over the not-installed prompt).

steps.content: Verify the link at the bottom of the section.
steps.expected: An "Enable banner" link with arrow icon should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the installation status check control reports the banner is not installed when the code is absent
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. The CookieYes installation code has not been added to the site (banner Inactive).

steps.content: Click the verify installation control.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the installation status check control activates the banner when the code is installed
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard with the banner showing Inactive. The installation code has just been added to the live site but the Dashboard status has not yet refreshed.

steps.content: Click the verify installation control to the right of the "Inactive" status.
steps.expected: A "Connecting to your site to verify installation" loader should be displayed and the site should open in a child window.

steps.content: Wait for the check to complete.
steps.expected: The status should update to indicate the banner is active on the website and the child window should close.

steps.content: Observe the verify installation control after activation.
steps.expected: The verify installation control should no longer be displayed once the status is Active.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Cookie Banner Status card shows Active after installing the code from the banner template selection page
cases.preconditions: User is on the banner template selection page, having completed the cookie banner setup flow. The installation code has been added to the live site.

steps.content: On the banner template page, click the "Verify Installation" link below the website URL.
steps.expected: A "Connecting to your site to verify installation" loader should be displayed and the site should open in a child window.

steps.content: Wait for verification to complete.
steps.expected: The status should indicate the banner is active on the website, the child window should close, and the "Verify Installation" link should disappear.

steps.content: Click "Go to Dashboard", then "Done! Take me to Dashboard".
steps.expected: The Dashboard page should be displayed.

steps.content: Locate the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The status should read "Active" with the message "You have successfully set up your cookie banner!"

steps.content: Verify the link at the bottom of the section.
steps.expected: A "Live preview banner" link should be displayed.

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Regulation field on the Banner Status Card reflects a regulation change made in Cookie Banner settings
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard. The Cookie Banner is configured with a regulation (e.g. GDPR).

steps.content: Note the current Regulation field value on the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The Regulation field should display the currently active regulation (e.g. GDPR).

steps.content: Navigate to Cookie Banner settings and change the regulation (e.g. from GDPR to CCPA) and save.
steps.expected: The change should save successfully.

steps.content: Return to the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Dashboard should be displayed.

steps.content: Observe the Regulation field on the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The Regulation field should reflect the updated regulation (e.g. CCPA).

cases.title: [Dashboard] Verify that the Targeted location field on the Banner Status Card reflects a geo-target change made in Cookie Banner settings
cases.preconditions: User is on the Dashboard on a Pro or Ultimate plan. The Cookie Banner has a targeted location configured (e.g. Worldwide).

steps.content: Note the current Targeted location value on the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The Targeted location field should display the currently configured location (e.g. Worldwide).

steps.content: Navigate to Cookie Banner settings and change the targeted location (e.g. from Worldwide to a specific country/region) and save.
steps.expected: The change should save successfully.

steps.content: Return to the Dashboard.
steps.expected: The Dashboard should be displayed.

steps.content: Observe the Targeted location field on the Cookie Banner Status card.
steps.expected: The Targeted location field should reflect the updated geo-target setting.
